news.t: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
Investing in the “Early Innings” of the AI Value Chain
Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs
Pictet Asset Management Launches First U.S. ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PBOT is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.02%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.57%, KLA Corporation at 6.12%, Broadcom at 5.67%, and ASML Holding at 5.45%.

overview.description: The Pictet AI & Automation ETF (PBOT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund holds an actively managed equity portfolio of companies from around the world identified to benefit from the transformative impact of AI and automation. PBOT was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by Pictet.

data.title: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
data.text: The rapid deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) is evident; 99% of CEOs say their companies are investing in the technology. Apparently, AI is also quick at garnering assets.

data.title: Pictet Asset Management Launches First U.S. ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pictet Asset Management announced the launch of three actively-managed ETFs to bring the strategies to U.S. financial advisors and investors.
